name: Mom-mom's Sonia's Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon black pepper or red pepper flakes (if you like hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a shallow baking pan. Sprinkle with garlic slices all around and under the chicken pieces.
2. Pour olive oil and wine over the chicken, then sprinkle basil, oregano, and pepper evenly.
3. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
5. Remove the foil and bake uncovered for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Garnish with parsley when ready to serve. Good with noodles or rice.
NOTE: My Mom worked and was not particularly a great cook, but what she did make she made well. This is one of her favorites and I will teach Sara how to make it. She is my oldest granddaughter and is named for my Mom. Most of my Bubbe recipes are from my Grandmother's cookbook.
SOURCE: A Jewish Mother's Cookbook; Author, Elaine Radis; published on disk by ONE COMMAND SOFTWARE, 1995.
